label: Instantly
description: Automate cold email campaigns and manage outreach sequences with Instantly.

form.title: Connect Instantly
form.subtitle: Paste your Instantly API key to let Anton manage campaigns and outreach on your behalf.

methods.label: API Key
methods.description: Paste your Instantly API key from Integrations → API. Quickest setup — no OAuth flow required.
methods.how_to:
## Connect with an Instantly API Key

1. Log in to your [Instantly](https://app.instantly.ai) account.
2. Click your account avatar or workspace name in the bottom-left corner to open account settings.
3. Navigate to **Integrations → API** in the left sidebar.
4. Click **Create API Key** (or copy an existing one if you already have one).
5. Give it a descriptive name like `Anton` so you can identify it later.
6. Copy the generated key — it may only be shown once, so save it somewhere safe.
7. Paste the key into the **API Key** field below and click **Submit**.

## Notes

- The API key provides access to your Instantly workspaces, campaigns, and lead lists — treat it like a password.
- If you suspect the key is compromised, return to **Integrations → API** and revoke it, then generate a new one and update Anton.
- Different workspace plans may expose different API endpoints; check your plan if certain features are unavailable.

fields.name: api_key
fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Found in Instantly → Integrations → API. Treat this like a password — do not share it.
